## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (e.g. "I'm experiencing high IPC socket latency when...")

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Designs
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other diagrams, models, or performance specs here.
